benefits.title: The platform that
benefits.subtitle: Trust in Curbe, an American technology platform where you always own your database. We scale with you while you maintain full control of your information.

unified.title: Unified communication
unified.description: iMessage, WhatsApp, SMS, and email in a single inbox. Respond to all your clients without switching apps. Complete conversation history with sentiment analysis.

security.title: Security and 24/7 accessibility
security.description: Access your book of business anytime, anywhere, even from your smartphone. We constantly improve and update security measures and encryption capabilities.

support.title: Efficient customer support
support.description: At Curbe you're independent, but never alone. Count on our customer service team to help you from day one, plus regular training in your language.

automation.title: Automate and organize processes
automation.description: Automate activities to reduce time-consuming manual tasks, such as task or document reminders and sending birthday greetings to clients.

time.title: Optimize time and resources
time.description: Streamline your business management! Create efficient processes that maximize your resources and your team's to improve customer service and retention with artificial intelligence.

teams.title: Team management
teams.description: Manage permissions, assign leads, monitor performance, and set individual goals. Complete visibility of your agency's performance.

analytics.title: Real-time reports and analytics
analytics.description: View sales, commissions, renewals, and critical KPIs. Export custom reports and make decisions based on up-to-the-second data. Identify opportunities before your competition.

howItWorks.title: Launch your first campaign in 4 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Link your Business Manager with the official Ads API in seconds. No intermediaries.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI interviews your brand to capture your voice, colors, and ideal audience. Consistency guaranteed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The assistant guides you: strategy, AI creatives, audience, and publication in one flow.
howItWorks.step4Desc: AI pauses losing ads, redistributes budget to winners, and automatically improves your ROAS.

respondHome.pillText: Reasons before acting — not just executing
respondHome.heroDesc: Curbe is the AI agent that creates, launches, and optimizes your product ads — then closes every sale on WhatsApp, SMS, and voice. You set the goal. It does the rest.
respondHome.heroStep1Text:
CPL of Ad Set "Lookalike 3%" rose from $14 → $34.2
Campaign running for 9 days. CPL target: $14.
respondHome.heroStep2Text: "Week 2 of campaign. My memory shows similar audiences saturate around day 8. Today is day 9. CPL is 2.4x above goal. Budget must shift to the winning set."
respondHome.heroStep3Text: Paused "Lookalike 3%" · Moved $180 → "Retargeting 30d" (CPL: $11.4) · Generated 3 new creatives with AI
respondHome.adShowcaseChatLead: Hi — I saw your ad and want info
respondHome.autoFixDesc: No touching. No waiting. No re-uploading.
respondHome.momentDesc: No emails. No notifications. Without you asking.
respondHome.momentObserveText: Your ad had been running 9 days. CPL climbed from $14 to $34. The audience saturated.
respondHome.momentReasonText: "In similar campaigns, this happens in week 2. The retargeting set has a CPL of $11. I need to shift the budget."
respondHome.momentActedText: Paused the losing ad. Redistributed $180. Created 3 new variants with AI.
respondHome.momentContrast: Zapier would have waited for you to notice.
respondHome.autonomySubtitle: Start with Copilot to build confidence. Scale to Autopilot when ready. The agent learns from every decision.
respondHome.copilotDesc: Curbe generates strategies, creatives and optimizations. Each action waits for your approval with a click before executing.
respondHome.pilotHeadline: The agent operates within your limits
respondHome.pilotDesc: Define budget caps, allowed channels and audiences. The agent acts freely within those guardrails.
respondHome.autopilotHeadline: The agent operates alone, you review results
respondHome.autopilotDesc: Total autonomy. The agent launches, optimizes, attends leads and scales campaigns. You receive a daily report.
respondHome.loopDesc: Unlike Zapier, Make or GoHighLevel — which follow predefined rules — Curbe's agent observes the current state, recalls relevant memory, reasons and decides. Every action has a reason. Every reason is recorded.
respondHome.loopPoint1Desc: Leading AI models make qualitative decisions and explain why
respondHome.loopPoint2Desc: Bayesian optimization + Bayesian inference allocate budget with mathematical precision
respondHome.loopPoint3Desc: Every decision, result and learning is saved and available in the next loop
respondHome.loopStep2Desc: Retrieves relevant memory from similar campaigns
respondHome.loopStep3Desc: LLM analyzes full state and decides the action
respondHome.loopStep4Desc: Launches the action — pause, create, respond, scale
respondHome.loopStep5Desc: Evaluates result — was this the right decision?
respondHome.loopStep6Desc: Saves full trace — decision + result + reason
respondHome.loopStep7Desc: Sleeps until the next cycle and starts again
respondHome.capSubtitle: The main agent orchestrates four specialized sub-agents. Each one is the best at its task.
respondHome.creativeAgentDesc: Orchestrates leading AI models to produce copy, images, videos and audio with your exact brand voice. Brand DNA guarantees total consistency.
respondHome.conversationalAgentDesc: Responds to WhatsApp, SMS and voice calls in seconds. Qualifies, schedules appointments and collects payments via Stripe — no human intervention, no lead left behind.
respondHome.conversationalLog1: Lead: "How much does the basic plan cost?"
respondHome.conversationalLog2: Agent: "From $97/mo. Should I send you the payment link? 🚀"
respondHome.optimizerAgentDesc: Bayesian optimization redistributes budget to winning ad sets in real time. Bayesian A/B testing declares winners with statistical rigor. No guessing.
respondHome.complianceAgentDesc: Monitors every ad before publishing, detects rejection risks and automatically corrects. 95% of rejections are recovered without human intervention.
respondHome.multiChannelDesc: Curbe isn't just ads. The same agent that launches your campaign also attends incoming leads, qualifies them, nurtures them via WhatsApp and SMS, and takes them to payment — without you touching anything.
respondHome.channelMetaDesc: Campaigns created, launched and optimized directly via Graph API
respondHome.channelWhatsAppDesc: Qualification, nurturing and sales closure on your customers' preferred channel
respondHome.channelSMSDesc: Mass reach for leads who don't open WhatsApp
respondHome.channelVoiceDesc: Automatic calls with synthetic AI voice for maximum conversion
respondHome.channelStripeDesc: Collect from the chat without leaving the conversation
respondHome.journeyStep1: Lead clicks on health insurance ad
respondHome.journeyStep3: Lead responds — agent qualifies and schedules appointment
respondHome.memoryBadge: The advantage that can't be copied
respondHome.memoryDesc: Memory is Curbe's moat. Every campaign, conversation and decision is persisted with its reason and result. Customer 1,000 starts with the distilled intelligence of the first 999.
respondHome.memoryPoint1Desc: What the agent learned about this specific business
respondHome.memoryPoint2Desc: Anonymized patterns from thousands of campaigns. Your agent inherits that knowledge.
respondHome.memoryPoint3Desc: Winning hooks and formats by niche, audience and goal
respondHome.memoryMetric1Desc: Improves week over week without human input
respondHome.memoryMetric3Desc: The agent never sleeps, never stops
respondHome.forWhomTitle1: For any business that wants to
respondHome.forWhomSubtitle: You don't need a marketing team. Just a clear goal.
respondHome.seg1Desc: Manage 10 accounts in the time you used to manage 3. Automatic creatives, per-client reports and 24/7 optimization.
respondHome.seg2Desc: Massive creative testing, dynamic catalog and automatic retargeting. The agent finds and scales winning ads.
respondHome.seg3Desc: Meta Lead Forms + integrated CRM + WhatsApp nurturing. The agent captures, qualifies and closes without you stepping in.
respondHome.seg4Desc: Your co-pilot that never sleeps. Monitors campaigns, detects creative fatigue, optimizes bids and complies with Meta policies.
respondHome.seg5Desc: Sell courses and coachings with campaigns that launch in minutes. The agent handles objections via WhatsApp and collects via Stripe.
respondHome.seg6Desc: Restaurants, salons, clinics, plumbers — the agent handles your ads and schedules appointments via WhatsApp while you work.
respondHome.testimV2Quote1: It used to take me 3 days to launch a campaign. Now the agent does it in 8 minutes while I sleep. My ROAS went from 2.1x to 5.4x in 6 weeks.
respondHome.testimV2Quote2: I have 23 active insurance accounts. Curbe handles the ads, responds to leads on WhatsApp and schedules appointments. Zero additional hires.
respondHome.testimV2Quote3: The agent paused my losing campaign at 2 AM Saturday and redirected the budget. By Monday I had 40% more leads at the same cost.
respondHome.testimV2FeaturedQuote: Curbe's agent doesn't follow rules — it reasons. It detected that my competitor cut budget on Tuesday, scaled my campaigns automatically and I closed my best week of the year.
respondHome.testimV2FeaturedRole: Founder, Digital Academy Online · $180K/mo in ads

respondHome.painTitle: Doing it yourself costs you time and money
respondHome.painSubtitle2: Not learn marketing, not pay agencies,
respondHome.painSubtitle3: not live inside the Ads Manager.
respondHome.pain1Desc: Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Business... Each platform has its own learning curve. You set up, test, fail, repeat. Meanwhile, your business needs attention.
respondHome.pain2Desc: Agencies charging $2,000/mo and taking weeks to launch one campaign. Never knowing if your money is generating results or just paying overhead.
respondHome.pain3Tag: OF BUSINESSES LOSE MONEY ON ADS
respondHome.pain3Desc: AI tools generating content from synthetic data. No knowledge of what actually works in your industry. Guessing blindly.
respondHome.whySubtitle1: Most AI tools generate content from synthetic data. Curbe is
respondHome.whySubtitle2: trained on real results from actual ads
respondHome.why1Desc: Curbe learns from real campaigns across e-commerce, restaurants, education, and more.
respondHome.why2Desc: Not just an AI that writes copy. End-to-end ad pipeline from idea to live campaign.
respondHome.why3Desc: Made by people who actually run ads, not just AI engineers. Real expertise baked in.
respondHome.platformsSubtitle: Publish your ads on the platforms already driving your industry. One click, every network.
respondHome.platform1Desc: Reach over 3 billion people on Facebook and Instagram. Precise targeting by interests, behavior, and lookalike audiences.
respondHome.platform2Desc: Show up right when they search for you. Search, display, and YouTube campaigns to capture active demand.
respondHome.platform3Desc: Connect with the generation that shops online the most. Native-feeling videos that drive real engagement.
respondHome.transformTitle: They weren't selling enough, wasted time on platforms, and paid agencies with no results.
respondHome.transform1Italic: "Spent afternoons in Meta Ads Manager with no results."
respondHome.transform1Bold: "I pick a strategy, Curbe does the rest. My ROAS tripled."
respondHome.transform2Italic: "$2,000/mo on an agency. Weeks to launch one campaign."
respondHome.transform2Bold: "Now we publish in minutes and save $23,000/year."
respondHome.transform3Bold: "A full day per client is now one hour for all. Finally scaling."

aiCopy.heroDescription: Generate persuasive copy and A/B testing variants with the best AI models. Every copy adapted to your brand voice thanks to Brand DNA. Ads that convert in seconds, not hours.

features.title: Multi-Variant Generation
features.description: Create 10, 20 or 50 copy variants with a single prompt. Perfect for massive A/B testing with zero effort.

features.title: Brand DNA Integration
features.description: AI captures your brand voice and tone so every copy maintains total consistency across all campaigns.

features.title: Goal-Based Optimization
features.description: Choose between conversions, traffic, engagement or leads — the AI adapts your copy to your campaign objective.

features.title: Automatic Translation
features.description: Generate copy in multiple languages while maintaining tone and intent. Perfect for multinational campaigns.

features.title: Competitor Analysis
features.description: AI analyzes competitor hooks and CTAs to create copy that stands out in any feed.

features.title: History & Versioning
features.description: Save all generated copy versions. Compare performance and iterate on what works.

aiCopy.ctaTitle: Start generating copy that converts today

aiImages.heroDescription: Generate product, lifestyle and conceptual images with the best visual AI models. No generic stock photos. No waiting for a designer.

features.title: Multi-Style Generation
features.description: Product photography, lifestyle, conceptual and more. Choose the style that works best for your audience.

features.title: Brand Consistency
features.description: Brand DNA ensures colors, lighting and visual style are consistent across all generated images.

features.title: Multi-Platform Formats
features.description: Automatically generate in 1:1, 4:5, 9:16 and 16:9 formats. Ready for Feed, Stories, Reels and more.

features.title: Edit & Refine
features.description: Adjust generated images with additional prompts. Change backgrounds, add text overlays and more.

features.title: Unlimited Variations
features.description: Generate dozens of variations from a single creative idea. Find the image that converts best.

features.title: No Stock Libraries
features.description: Forget about Shutterstock. Every image is original and generated specifically for your campaign.

aiImages.ctaTitle: Generate images that stand out in the feed

aiVideos.heroDescription: Generate short videos for Meta Ads with multi-modal AI. From visual hooks to animated CTAs. No cameraman, no editor, no waiting.

features.title: Optimized Vertical Videos
features.description: Generate native 9:16 videos for Reels and Stories. The format that converts best on Meta Ads.

features.title: Text Animations
features.description: Animated subtitles, text overlays and visual CTAs automatically generated to maximize retention.

features.title: AI-Generated B-Roll
features.description: AI generates b-roll shots and transitions to make your videos more dynamic and professional.

features.title: Automatic Voice-Over
features.description: Add AI narration in multiple languages and tones. Automatically synced with the video.

features.title: High-Impact Hooks
features.description: The first 3 seconds define your CTR. AI generates visual hooks optimized to stop the scroll.

features.title: Multi-Resolution Export
features.description: Export in HD, Full HD and mobile-optimized. Ready to publish on Meta Ads without extra compression.

aiVideos.ctaTitle: Create videos that stop the scroll

aiAudio.heroDescription: Generate voice-overs, narration and audio spots with the most realistic AI voices on the market. Direct ElevenLabs integration for cinematic-quality audio.

features.title: Ultra-Realistic Voices
features.description: Direct ElevenLabs integration. Voices that sound 100% human, with intonation, pauses and emotion.

features.title: Multiple Languages & Accents
features.description: Generate audio in English, Spanish, Portuguese and more with native accents. Perfect for multinational campaigns.

features.title: Voice Cloning
features.description: Clone your brand's voice or a specific narrator to maintain total consistency across all campaigns.

features.title: Video Sync
features.description: Audio automatically syncs with your AI-generated videos. Perfect lip-sync and timing.

features.title: Background Music
features.description: Add copyright-free background music generated by AI. Adjust volume and duration automatically.

features.title: Multi-Format Export
features.description: Export as MP3, WAV and Meta Ads-optimized formats. Professional quality without editing software.

aiAudio.ctaTitle: Give your ads a voice with AI

videoEditor.heroDescription: Edit, trim, add subtitles and overlays to your videos without leaving Curbe. A complete editor integrated into the platform that closes the creative loop.

features.title: Automatic Subtitles
features.description: Generate animated subtitles with high accuracy in multiple languages. Customizable styles for your brand.

features.title: Overlays & Effects
features.description: Add text overlays, emojis, visual CTAs and transition effects for more dynamic videos.

features.title: Multi-Format Trimming
features.description: Convert horizontal videos to vertical (9:16) with smart cropping. One video, all platforms.

features.title: Professional Timeline
